channel.title: mcp Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the mcp codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.description: Architecture documentation for the GraphCache class in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.

item.title: AnalysisTools Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: The business logic layer providing structural insights such as call traversals and symbol definitions. Architectural overview of the AnalysisTools domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 6 source files.

item.title: GraphCache Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: A high-performance indexing and storage layer for repository structural data. Architectural overview of the GraphCache domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: McpServer Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: The primary entry point that implements the Model Context Protocol to expose code analysis tools to AI clients. Architectural overview of the McpServer domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 5 source files.

item.title: SupermodelSDK Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: External service integration for generating code graphs from repository source content. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 4 source files.

item.title: ApiClient — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles authenticated HTTP requests to the Supermodel graph service. Architecture documentation for the ApiClient subdomain (part of SupermodelSDK domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ArchitecturalMapper — mcp Architecture
item.description: Aggregates domain-level metadata to provide high-level abstractions. Architecture documentation for the ArchitecturalMapper subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: CallTracer — mcp Architecture
item.description: Traverses upstream and downstream relationships in the graph. Architecture documentation for the CallTracer subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Configuration — mcp Architecture
item.description: Manages environment variables and SDK authentication. Architecture documentation for the Configuration subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Idempotency — mcp Architecture
item.description: Generates unique keys based on git status and file system paths. Architecture documentation for the Idempotency subdomain (part of SupermodelSDK domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: IndexingEngine — mcp Architecture
item.description: Converts raw IR into optimized adjacency lists and name indexes. Architecture documentation for the IndexingEngine subdomain (part of GraphCache domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: InstructionManager — mcp Architecture
item.description: Injects dynamic architectural context into the LLM system prompt. Architecture documentation for the InstructionManager subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: LruManager — mcp Architecture
item.description: Tracks memory pressure and evicts graphs based on node counts. Architecture documentation for the LruManager subdomain (part of GraphCache domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SymbolResolver — mcp Architecture
item.description: Identifies code entities using Class.method or partial matching syntax. Architecture documentation for the SymbolResolver subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Transport — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles Stdio-based communication with the MCP client. Architecture documentation for the Transport subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ZipProcessor — mcp Architecture
item.description: Recursively archives files with security-aware exclusions. Architecture documentation for the ZipProcessor subdomain (part of SupermodelSDK domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
